ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the issue reported */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the ticket */,
  "created_user_country" TEXT /* Country of the user who created the ticket */,
  "ticket_owner" TEXT /* Name of the user currently assigned to the ticket */,
  "state_status" TEXT /* Current state or status of the ticket */,
  "queue_ownergroup" TEXT /* Queue or owner group responsible for the ticket */,
  "ownergroup_country" TEXT /* Country of the owner group */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who reported the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue reported */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the resolution of the ticket */,
  "sla_breach_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket breached the Service Level Agreement (SLA) */,
  "escalation_level" TEXT /* Level of escalation for the ticket */,
  "estimated_resolution_date" TEXT /* Estimated date and time when the ticket will be resolved */,
  "resolution_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with resolving the ticket */,
  "satisfaction_rating" TEXT /* Customer satisfaction rating after resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES ticket_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_ticket_owner FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_owner") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES ticket_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_queue_ownergroup FOREIGN KEY ("queue_ownergroup") REFERENCES owner_groups ("ownergroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_department" TEXT /* Department the customer belongs to */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_company" TEXT /* Company the customer is from */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "customer_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the customer */,
  "customer_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "customer_regional_preferences" TEXT /* Regional preferences for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Support Staff, Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to a role table to manage user roles more effectively */,
  "user_supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the user's supervisor */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owner_groups" (
  "ownergroup_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the owner group */,
  "ownergroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner group */,
  "ownergroup_country" TEXT /* Country of the owner group */,
  "ownergroup_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner group */,
  "ownergroup_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the owner group */,
  "ownergroup_department" TEXT /* Department the owner group belongs to */,
  "ownergroup_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the owner group */,
  "ownergroup_manager" TEXT /* Name of the manager of the owner group */,
  "ownergroup_supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor of the owner group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownergroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the change */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change made to the ticket */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_comment_by FOREIGN KEY ("comment_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., Image, Text, Document) */,
  "file_metadata" TEXT /* Metadata about the file (e.g., creation date, author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_priorities" (
  "priority_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "priority_description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "priority_escalation_threshold" TEXT /* Time threshold for escalation to the next priority level */,
  "priority_color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the category */,
  "category_escalation_path" TEXT /* Path for escalation within the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
